extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series starts at a medium value and quickly rises to a pronounced early peak above 0.75, then falls back sharply.
R2: In the middle segment (roughly indices 20–45), the series forms a broad hump that stays mostly between 0.35 and 0.65 without dropping near 0.
R3: In the last third (after index ~45), the series contains at least one very sharp, tall spike above 0.6 followed by a fast drop.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series rapidly falls from a high value (~0.7–0.8) down to near the minimum (around or below 0.15).
R2: In the middle segment (roughly indices 20–45), the series stays in a moderate band, mostly between 0.3 and 0.6, without forming a broad, smooth hill.
R3: In the last third (after index ~45), the series oscillates with medium peaks (around 0.45–0.6) but without an isolated, dominating spike above ~0.7.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts around a medium value (≈0.5–0.6), without a sharp early spike above ≈0.8 in the first 10% of the series.  
R2: Contains at least one clear dip toward a low value (≈0.1–0.2) roughly in the first half of the series.  
R3: After the mid‑series region, returns to and stays around a medium band (≈0.4–0.6) without repeated sharp peaks and valleys.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Exhibits a pronounced early spike above ≈0.8 within the first 10–15% of the series, followed by a rapid drop to low values (≈0.1–0.2).  
R2: In the middle portion of the series, oscillates around medium values (≈0.4–0.6) without very deep dips to near zero.  
R3: Contains one or more additional sharp narrow peaks (tall, thin spikes) in the second half of the series, separating relatively flat medium‑level segments.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The early segment (up to about index 15) shows a sharp peak above 0.8 followed by a quick drop toward about 0.2–0.3.  
R2: The mid segment (roughly indices 15–40) forms a broad plateau around 0.45–0.65 with relatively small fluctuations.  
R3: The late segment (after about index 40) alternates between narrow spikes up to around 0.65–0.7 and dips down near 0.15–0.25.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The early segment (up to about index 15) drops steadily from a high value (around 0.6–0.9) down to a low around 0.2, without forming a sustained early plateau.  
R2: The mid segment (roughly indices 15–40) oscillates around a moderate level (~0.4–0.5) without maintaining a broad, flat plateau.  
R3: The late segment (after about index 40) has smaller-amplitude fluctuations centered around 0.35–0.5, without repeated tall spikes and deep dips like in Class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a medium‑high level (around 0.5–0.7) and then quickly drops to a clear low (around 0.1–0.2) within the first 10–15 time steps.  
R2: After this early drop, the middle section (roughly time 15–50) stays in a moderate band (about 0.3–0.6) with several small up‑and‑down oscillations but without any very sharp spikes to the top or bottom.  
R3: Toward the end (after about time 50), the series returns to and remains in a moderately high band (about 0.4–0.6) without deep dips.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a strong spike or strong drop in the first 10–15 time steps, reaching either very high (near 0.8–1.0) or very low (near 0.0–0.1) values more extremely than Class 0.  
R2: In the middle section (roughly time 15–50), the series shows wider, more irregular swings, often moving between low values (around 0.1–0.3) and moderate values (around 0.4–0.6), instead of staying in a narrow middle band.  
R3: In the last part (after about time 50), the series tends to stay in a lower to mid range (about 0.3–0.5) and does not clearly “recover” to a sustained higher band like Class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early segment (first 5–10% of time), the value is relatively high (around 0.6–0.8) and then drops sharply to a low (≈0.1–0.2).  
R2: After this first sharp drop, the series stays in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) for most of the middle part, with only moderate oscillations (no long stays near 0).  
R3: There is no strong, isolated spike to near the maximum range (≈1.0) anywhere in the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Early in the series (first 5–10% of time), there is a steep rise to a very high peak (close to the top of the range, ≈0.9–1.0) followed by a rapid fall toward low values.  
R2: In the middle portion, the series alternates between mid-range (≈0.3–0.6) and distinctly low values (≈0–0.2), creating pronounced “valleys” below the mid-level.  
R3: One or more of the low valleys in the mid/late part is immediately followed by a sharp rebound back to mid or high values, giving a “deep dip then quick recovery” pattern.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial peak, the series forms a broad, relatively flat “plateau” region in the middle (roughly one-third to two-thirds of the length) where values hover around 0.4–0.6 with only small oscillations.  
R2: The lowest values (near 0.1–0.2) tend to occur after this middle plateau, closer to the later part of the series.  
R3: The final segment rises again from a low region to moderate values (around 0.4–0.6) without returning to very low values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After an initial peak, the series drops sharply to its lowest values (near 0.1–0.2) very early, in the first quarter of the sequence.  
R2: The central part of the series shows moderate oscillations (around 0.3–0.6) but without a long, flat plateau at a single level.  
R3: In the later part, the series contains one or more pronounced “valleys” (drops to near 0.1–0.2) between higher segments, rather than a single smooth rise toward the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series starts relatively high (around 0.6–0.7) and then clearly drops toward a low value below about 0.3.  
R2: Around the middle region (time steps ~20–40), the series stabilizes into moderate values, mostly oscillating between about 0.4 and 0.6 without very sharp spikes.  
R3: In the last third (after time step ~45), the series shows one clear deep dip (below about 0.25) but otherwise stays in the moderate range (roughly 0.3–0.6) without reaching extreme highs.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very beginning (first ~5 time steps), the series either starts already high or rapidly rises to a pronounced peak above about 0.7–0.8.  
R2: The early portion (up to about time step 15) features a strong fall from this peak to a clear low near or below 0.2, forming a steep peak–valley pattern.  
R3: In the remaining part of the series, values mostly stay in a mid-range (about 0.3–0.6) with several noticeable sharp fluctuations, including at least one additional relatively deep dip (below about 0.25) that does not follow a long, smooth recovery.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the series, there is a sharp peak that reaches close to the global maximum, followed rapidly by a strong drop.  
R2: The mid-section (about 20%–60% of the series) stays in a moderate band without very low values (rarely below ~0.2) and without very sharp spikes.  
R3: The last 20% of the series shows only mild oscillations around a mid-level, with no rapid ascent from near-zero to a high peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The early part (first 15%–20%) stays moderate; it does not contain the highest peak and does not drop quickly to near-zero.  
R2: There is at least one pronounced spike in the second half (roughly 40%–80% of the series) where the value climbs steeply from near-zero (or a clear local minimum) to near the global maximum.  
R3: Very low values (near-zero troughs) appear later in the series, followed closely in time by high peaks, producing sharper late volatility than in Class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the middle part of the series (roughly indices 20–45), the values stay mostly above 0.3, forming a broad plateau or gentle hill with moderate variation (no sharp, deep drops).
R2: There is typically a pronounced peak above 0.65 before index 15 or after index 40.
R3: The lowest values in the whole series do not stay near 0 for long; short dips can occur but quickly return above ~0.2.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the middle part of the series (roughly indices 20–45), the values fluctuate around 0.4–0.6 without forming a long, smooth plateau; ups and downs are more frequent and irregular.
R2: There is at least one sharp, deep drop after index 40 where the value falls close to 0 (around or below 0.1) and then rises again.
R3: Any high peaks above ~0.75, if present, are isolated and followed by a rapid decline rather than a sustained high region.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first quarter of the series, the value drops quickly from a relatively high level (around 0.6–0.8) to a pronounced low (below about 0.25), then recovers.  
R2: Around the middle of the series there is a clear, sharp peak reaching around 0.8 followed by a deep valley (around 0.1–0.2) shortly after.  
R3: In the last quarter, the series rises again from that valley and stabilizes in a medium range (roughly 0.4–0.6) without extremely sharp swings.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (around 0.6–0.8 or above) and then steadily declines into a low region (around or below 0.2) within the first quarter.  
R2: Through the middle of the series, the values stay mostly in a moderate range (about 0.3–0.6) with smaller, smoother oscillations than class 0 (no isolated, very sharp tall peak plus deep valley).  
R3: In the last quarter, the series again shows moderate oscillations in the mid-range (roughly 0.3–0.6), without a strong recovery from an extreme low just before it.
